label: Light Control Logic
info: Automatic Lux and Manual Override Control Logic for SmartHouse Lights (LR-LUTV, MB-LOB, MB-LOTV, TER-LIGHTS)

name: SQL: Select Initial States
func:
msg.payload = "SELECT json_agg(t) FROM (SELECT code, state, locked, locked_until_utc FROM main.appliance WHERE code IN ('LR-LUTV', 'MB-LOB', 'MB-LOTV', 'TER-LIGHTS')) t;";
return msg;

name: Parse & Sync States
Calculate 5-Min Rolling Average
Power Control Engine
Physical Switch override
10 PM Group OFF Handler
